articles.description: A chaotic 13-minute spell from Man City in the second half of a six-goal thriller at Everton could prove to be the visitors' undoing in the Premier League title race.
articles.title: Everton 3-3 Man City: Will 13 chaotic minutes cost Man City in Premier League title race?

articles.description: Wu Yize becomes the second-youngest player to be crowned a Crucible champion after defeating Shaun Murphy 18-17 in a compelling World Championship final.
articles.title: World Snooker Championship 2026: Wu Yize beats Shaun Murphy in decider to become second youngest Crucible champion

articles.description: BBC Scotland chief sports writer Tom English sums up the chaos and cacophony of Hearts' win over Rangers at Tynecastle.
articles.title: Tom English: 'Pure theatre puts Hearts on cusp of title fairytale'

articles.description: The battle for Premier League survival is hotting up with Nottingham Forest, Tottenham and West Ham fighting for their lives.
articles.title: Premier League: The relegation battle more like a title race

articles.description: After a sixth-straight league loss, Chelsea are almost certain to miss out on Champions League qualification - a bitter blow which is likely to have far‑reaching consequences.
articles.title: Chelsea: What failing to qualify for Champions League means for Blues

articles.description: Bowler Ollie Robinson confirms he has been in contact with both England head coach Brendon McCullum and managing director Rob Key as he eyes a recall to the Test side.
articles.title: Ollie Robinson: England bowler in contact with Brendon McCullum and Rob Key as he eyes Test recall

articles.description: Jose Mourinho's Benfica could go an entire season unbeaten - but it will not be enough to deliver the club a 39th Portuguese league title.
articles.title: Benfica: Jose Mourinho's team on course for unbeaten campaign but miss out on title

articles.description: After every round of Premier League matches this season, Troy Deeney gives us his team of the week. Do you agree with his choices?
articles.title: Troy Deeney's Team of the Week: Doku, Van de Ven, Gyokeres, Mainoo, Gallagher

articles.description: With Bukayo Saka back from injury for Arsenal, could he prove the difference-maker in the finale to the Gunners' season?
articles.title: Bukayo Saka back to his best at crucial time for Arsenal

articles.description: BBC Sport tactics expert Umir Irfan looks at how Roberto de Zerbi has revived Premier League strugglers Tottenham.
articles.title: Tottenham Hotspur: How Roberto de Zerbi brought life to sinking Spurs
